'''Milo Mensix''' was the founder of [[Mensix Corp]] and the [[Mensix Mining Facility/Legends|Mensix Mining Facility]] on [[Mustafar/Legends|Mustafar]].

{{Char-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
Milo Mensix appeared as a non-player character in the video game Star Wars Galaxies, a massively multiplayer online roleplaying game developed by [[Sony]] and published by LucasArts, prior to its closure on [[December 15]], 2011.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars Galaxies: Trials of Obi-Wan]]''
